title: Legacy console edition visuals
description: Make the game look like the legacy console edition
body:
**Requires fabulous! Graphics mode for Gamma**

check Readme.txt inside of the resourcepack for how to edit the Gamma

water and colormap based on Wii-U verison of minecraft

make sure to use programmer art

use either moody or normal brightness in minecraft options settings

also make sure to have mipmapping enabled



use these mods for the best experience:
-
Modern Beta, NostalgicTweaks, Console sounds


Optional: Fabric seasons, Falling Leaves
